title: Create: Cardboarded Conveynience
description: A small tweak allowing players to be disguised as packages even on chain conveyor. Extra chain conveyor related features may come in the future.
body:
# Create: Cardboarded Conveynience

**Disguise yourself as a package?** Great!

**Hang onto a chain conveyor?** Cool!

**So... why not both?**

This addon brings a community-suggested feature to life:

If you are wearing a full cardboard armor and you hang onto a chain conveyor... you'll get disguised just as if you crouched. Except here, no sneaking is required.

## Credit where credit's due

Big thanks to Reddit user **u/Ok-Physics3703** for the original idea! It was such a simple, clever, and fairly easy concept to implement—and the moment I saw it, I had to try making it real.

## New features in 0.1.1 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UFHjl5ADU28" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## And with 1.0.0

Added Ponder + release NeoForge 1.21.1

## What's next

Few more small ideas + I also tested how it bodes with Aeronautics: some features do NOT work on Aeronautics contraptions... yet. I'll try to get them working...

## Translations

Looking for translators willing to helpout bringing relevant advancements and Ponder scenes to more languages

🔧

📦
